seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The email must include the keyword "bank" as a noun, conveying the definition "an organization that provides various financial services, for example keeping or lending money" from the Oxford Dictionary.
new_constraint: Use the keyword "bank" exclusively as a verb, conveying the definition "to form sth into piles."
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The email must include the keyword "bank" as a noun, conveying the definition "an organization that provides various financial services, for example keeping or lending money" from the Oxford Dictionary. Use the keyword "bank" exclusively as a verb, conveying the definition "to form sth into piles."
response:
Subject: Status Inquiry: Laptop Repair Order #4592

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to inquire about the current status of my laptop repair, which was submitted on October 15th under reference number #4592.

While I understand that the cost of this service was covered by my personal **bank** (an organization that provides various financial services, for example keeping or lending money), I would appreciate an update on the timeline for completion.

Additionally, could you please let me know if any loose screws or detached components were found during the initial inspection? If so, please **bank** (to form sth into piles) them securely in the designated area before reassembly to ensure nothing is lost during the process.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

Alex Johnson
(555) 123-4567
alex.johnson@email.com
